Celest AI
Celest AI: Create, Train, Deploy - Your AI Agents

The first AI powered protocol enabling users to build AI agents through visual interfaces, backed by GPU clusters and proprietary training algorithms.

Our Vision
Empowering Personalized AI Solutions

At Celest AI, we aim to make artificial intelligence truly personal and accessible. Our platform is designed to go beyond the basics of building AI agents, offering users the ability to train these agents to meet their specific needs with precision and flexibility.
By combining intuitive tools with powerful training capabilities, we empower individuals and businesses to create intelligent agents that seamlessly adapt to their goals. This approach transforms AI into a practical, customizable solution, making it an integral part of solving everyday challenges.

Our Vision
Empowering Personalized AI Solutions

At Celest AI, we aim to make artificial intelligence truly personal and accessible. Our platform is designed to go beyond the basics of building AI agents, offering users the ability to train these agents to meet their specific needs with precision and flexibility.
By combining intuitive tools with powerful training capabilities, we empower individuals and businesses to create intelligent agents that seamlessly adapt to their goals. This approach transforms AI into a practical, customizable solution, making it an integral part of solving everyday challenges.

Features

Revolutionary Capabilities

Deploy your trained AI agents instantly across multiple environments with automated load balancing and dedicated API endpoints for seamless integration.

Visual Agent Builder

Transform your ideas into AI agents through our intuitive drag-and-drop interface, powered by CelestCore Engine and 10+ GPU clusters.

Customizable Training Engine

Fine-tune your AI agents with precision using adjustable parameters for risk tolerance, learning speed, and behavioral patterns specific to your needs.

Advanced Performance Analytics

Monitor your AI agent performance in real-time through comprehensive dashboards, optimize their behavior, and track key metrics for continuous improvement.

Liquidity Pool

90%

Celest AI: The first platform where users build and train personalized AI agents using our proprietary CelestCore Engine. Powered by 10+ NVIDIA A100 GPU clusters, users can create agents for trading, automation, and content generation with custom parameters - all through a visual interface.
